title: Update README.md
body:
With all the new stuff we merged in master the README.md got a bit outdated now. We would need to updated it in order to reflect the current master code with examples. Also, with the upcoming move to libraries it will be far far better to have something easy shown in the main github page.

@mtrmac :)

comments.body:
I just tried skopeo on fedora 23 following the instructions on `README.md`.  
`skopeo inspect docker://docker.io/fedora` works normally.

However, when I ran `skopeo inspect docker://registry.access.redhat.com/rhel7`, the following error happened:

```
hmeng@localhost ~$ skopeo inspect docker://registry.access.redhat.com/rhel7
FATA[0001] error pinging repository, response code 404
```
BTW, I am an intern working on project atomic at the Westford office this summer, let me know if there is some easy bug I can start to play with.

> BTW, I am an intern working on project atomic at the Westford office this summer, let me know if there is some easy bug I can start to play with.

Hey there, and welcome :)

> hmeng@localhost ~$ skopeo inspect docker://registry.access.redhat.com/rhel7
> FATA[0001] error pinging repository, response code 404

Our RH registry is not currently supported in skopeo atm so you can't use it
Would be amazing to have the README.md talking about all the `copy`, policies, signatures stuff @mtrmac talked about at yesterday demo - that was awesome!

#96 adds `copy` and `delete`.

`--signed-by` exists in `master` (and is documented in the man page) but is not really usable before #93 lands.
`--policy` should, similarly, be added together or after the code which implements it.
@TomSweeneyRedHat Could you look into the readme, and make sure it is up2date.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
